query_plan_notes: Standalone extraction preserves existing queue/report indexes from the baseline migration.
No cross-schema SQL foreign keys were detected in migration SQL or PostgreSQL metadata.
fixes_applied: Folded API, shared, auth, db, and testing packages into a single backend package.
Replaced workspace imports with standalone package imports and verified compiled output has no workspace aliases.
Removed frontend dependencies, frontend Docker services, and frontend QA checks from active standalone scripts.
Added backend-only dev, QA, prod Docker Compose files and isolated dev/test ports.
Made database-resetting test projects run sequentially to avoid schema reset contention.
Added backend-only static checks for frontend dependency leakage and monorepo path leakage.
